...appreciated potholes will continue as a never ending problem in NYC due to high volume of traffic, very cold and often wet weather, and old NYC infrastructure.

Due to a large budget gap NYC must increase revenue. I wonder how much could be gained by NYC doing away with corporate tax loopholes?
author: SirNYC

text: As the city exhales after a long week, the streets pulse with nightlife. Neon lights flicker like fireflies, while the hum of traffic whispers sweet nothings. The smell of pretzels lingers, a comfort amidst the chaos. Another Friday fades, but NYC never sleeps—just takes a quick power nap.
